data.title: Generic injectables market led by hospital pharmacies with 61.23% share, online pharmacies growing at 18.06% CAGR, market worth USD 131.68B in 2025 to hit USD 251.03B in 2030 - Mordor Intelligence.
data.description: A report by Mordor Intelligence revealed that the generic injectables market in 2025 is worth USD 131.68 billion, with a projected increase to over USD 251.03 billion by 2030. This represents a compound annual growth rate of 13.78% for the forecast period of 2025-2030. The data was based on research conducted in Hyderabad, India.

data.description: There is a projected increase in the price of SUI to $2.20 by January 2025. However, in the near future, a dip to $1.19-$1.25 is anticipated due to prevailing bearish sentiment, with 79-88% negative indicators.

data.title: Palantir launches Chain Reaction for American AI infrastructure; partners include CenterPoint Energy & NVIDIA. Energy infrastructure needs accelerated AI buildout.
data.description: Denver-based Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) recently introduced Chain Reaction, an operating system tailored for the American AI infrastructure. The company emphasized that the hindrance to AI advancement is no longer algorithms, but issues pertaining to power and computing capacities. In light of the current energy infrastructure development phase in the United States, a software that caters to a large scale like Chain Reaction becomes imperative. This system aims to expedite the AI expansion in collaboration with energy producers, power distributors, and other entities involved in the sector.

data.title: DOGP to increase DOG token holdings to 8B through MEMECOINS subsidiary's deal for 4B tokens, doubling its exposure.
data.description: DOGP's subsidiary, MEMECOINS, has recently announced an agreement to purchase 4 billion DOG tokens. This acquisition will significantly increase DOGP's overall exposure to the DOG currency, with the total amount held across its digital-asset entities now exceeding 8 billion DOG.

data.title: Formycon & MS Pharma form partnership to commercialize FYB206 Keytruda® biosimilar in MENA region.
data.description: In a joint statement on December 4, 2025, Formycon AG and MS Pharma disclosed their exclusive licensing and supply deal for the distribution of FYB206, Formycon's biosimilar drug. The agreement pertains to the commercialization of FYB206, with Formycon holding the FSE: FYB, Prime Standard designation. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies in the pharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Kahoot! report on UK Gen Z workers after 1 year: reveals generational tensions, search for belonging, recognition, purpose.
data.description: A recent survey conducted in the UK sheds light on the work experiences of Generation Z after completing one year in their jobs. The study reveals that this period has been influenced by generational conflicts and the quest for a sense of belonging, acknowledgment, and significance. The findings, released in London on December 4, 2025, indicate that the youngest workers in Britain are introducing new viewpoints to the workforce...

data.title: XFun dating app reports 35% year-over-year growth in user base as demand increases for clear, commitment-free connections.
data.description: Today, XFun, a platform known for facilitating commitment-free connections since 2019, revealed a considerable increase in its user base. The platform has prioritized transparent casual dating as part of its growth strategy. The surge in users showcases the demand for clear-intent relationships in the community.
